$comment: Internal tracking file for an OpenSSF Best Practices badge self-assessment. This is NOT an official OpenSSF schema or artifact -- the real badge is issued via a web form at https://www.bestpractices.dev/. This file exists so the self-assessment in docs/openssf-evidence.md is machine-readable and easy to keep in sync when the actual form is filled out.
known_blockers: No release has been published yet, so release-notes-per-release is unverified in practice

Trivy container-image scanning (added 2026-07-03) found 50+ open CVE alerts against the built Docker image, mostly in the Alpine base image and npm/corepack's own bundled dependencies rather than this project's own code -- not yet triaged
resolved_blockers: 7 open CodeQL alerts (1 high severity) -- resolved 2026-07-03: 1 fixed in code, 7 dismissed with rationale re-verified against current code (see SECURITY_DECISIONS.md)
